subject: Scaffold project and design system
description:
**Start here.** Initialize the frontend project and lock the design system.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md, fundforge.md, design/design_guidelines.json, and design/frontend/src/index.css for context.

Work:
- Choose and scaffold the frontend framework (React + Vite or Next.js - whatever ships fastest)
- Extract design tokens from design_guidelines.json into tailwind.config (colors, fonts, spacing, radius, shadows)
- Set up CSS variables for shadcn/ui theming (HSL format from design/frontend/src/index.css)
- Import Google Fonts (Libre Baskerville + Manrope)
- Pull over shadcn/ui components from design/frontend/src/components/ui/ that we'll need (Button, Card, Badge, Avatar, Progress at minimum)
- Set up routing (3 routes: /campaign/:id, /community, /profile/:id)
- Verify: a blank page renders with correct fonts and colors

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Stack decisions made and why
- File structure established
- Any deviations from the design reference
- How to run the dev server

changes: Scaffolded Vite 7 + React 19 project in app/
Ported tailwind.config.js with full design token system (HSL colors, fonts, radius, shadows)
Created index.css with shadcn/ui CSS variables matching design reference
Added Google Fonts (Libre Baskerville + Manrope) via preconnect + link in index.html
Ported 10 shadcn/ui components: Button, Card, Badge, Avatar, Progress, Dialog, Tabs, Separator, Tooltip, Sonner
Added custom accent Button variant for donate/CTA actions
Set up React Router 7 with 3 routes: /campaign/:id, /community, /profile/:id
Created placeholder pages with correct layout patterns and data-testid attributes
Updated CLAUDE.md with stack decisions, file structure, deviations
learnings: Vite 7 ships with React 19 template out of the box
npm ci requires lockfile - use npm install for initial scaffold
Sonner's reference component uses next-themes which we dropped since no dark mode needed
loose_ends: Pages use placeholder data - task #9 (data fixtures) will provide real data
No shared layout/nav yet - that's task #6
